upstream_evidence_note: Briefly state where the URL, license ID, and fishery substrate evidence came from. This does not replace local source/license fingerprints or human review.
notes: Copy this file to config/govsim_source.json after adding the source checkout inside this setting. Replace upstream_url and upstream_license_url with non-placeholder authoritative URLs. source_prompt_files must point to non-empty fishery rule/instruction/resource text used for translation and local bring-up.
